# Trichomes

> Trichomes Cosmeceuticals is a Nigeria-based online skincare retailer selling science-backed,
> nature-inspired cosmeceutical products, alongside expert one-on-one skincare consultations.

Trichomes sells skincare and cosmeceutical products (cleansers, serums, moisturizers, treatments,
and more) sourced from trusted brands, curated for Nigerian skin and climate. Customers can shop
by product or category, book a paid consultation with a skincare expert, and check out as a guest
or a registered account. Payments are processed via Paystack; delivery is available across Nigeria.

## Key pages

- [Shop all products](https://www.trichomesshop.com/products): full product catalog
- [Brands](https://www.trichomesshop.com/brands): brands carried by Trichomes
- [Book a consultation](https://www.trichomesshop.com/consultation): paid 1:1 skincare consultations
- [About](https://www.trichomesshop.com/about): company background and mission
- [Shipping policy](https://www.trichomesshop.com/shipping): delivery times and costs by Nigerian state
- [Returns policy](https://www.trichomesshop.com/returns): return and refund terms
- [Terms of use](https://www.trichomesshop.com/terms)
- [Privacy policy](https://www.trichomesshop.com/privacy): NDPR-compliant data handling
